E:\software\Cmake\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\BrickGame.dir/objects.a
E:\software\MSYS2\ucrt64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\BrickGame.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\BrickGame.dir\objects1.rsp
E:\software\MSYS2\ucrt64\bin\g++.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\BrickGame.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o BrickGame.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libBrickGame.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\BrickGame.dir\linkLibs.rsp
